Subject: MV ST MICHAEL 40.522 DWT OPEN PORT SUDAN, RED SEA 07/12 DEC 2025.
 
-/ Maisam
KINDLY PPOSE RATED BIZ FOR BELOW LADY  
 
MV ST MICHAEL 40.522 DWT OPEN PORT SUDAN, RED SEA 07/12 DEC 2025.
 
+ GOA OK 
+ OPEN HATCH BOX SHAPED, GRABBER 
+ SUPER ECO, CO2 FITTED, A60 FITTED 
                               
MV ST MICHAEL
BLT JAN/2024 JNS, CHINA
CLASS: DNV
FLAG: MARSHALL ISLANDS
ABT 40.522,28 DWT ON 10,95 M SCANTLING DRFT, TPC: 50.8
SINGLE DECK/BULK CARRIER/BOX SHAPE OPEN HATCH CARGO HOLDS WITH DOUBLE SKIN
INT GRT/NRT: 25171/13740
LDT: 9499.02T
LOA 179,90 M/BEAM 30.00 M AHL/CO2 5 H/H
GEAR 4 X 30,5T CRANES + 4 X 12 CBM GRABS GRAIN ABT 50.515,6 CBM / BALE ABT
49.321,2 CBM
2X25MT STEEL COIL IN HOLDS (DEPENDS ON COIL SIZE - AS PER VSL'S STEEL
LOADING MANUAL)
CONTAINER CAPACITY ON DECK 268 TEU/IN HOLD 560 TEU (TTL 828 TEU 14T) FOR
20'ISO 1CC
BWTS FITTED, USCG APPROVED.
OPEN HATCH BOX SHAPED (OHBS)
DAILY SPEED & CONSUMPTION:
AT SEA:
- LADEN ECO (FOR REF, WOG): ABT 12,0 KNOTS ON ABT 15,0 MTS/PD VLSFO/LSMGO +
ABT 0,10 MTS/PD LSMGO
- BALLAST ECO(FOR REF, WOG) : ABT 12,5 KNOTS ON ABT 14,0 MTS/PD VLSFO/LSMGO
+ ABT 0,10 MTS/PD LSMGO
- LADEN: ABT 13,0 KNOTS ON ABT 19,0 MTS/PD VLSFO/LSMGO + ABT 0,10 MTS/PD
LSMGO
- BALLAST: ABT 13,5 KNOTS ON ABT 19,0 MTS/PD VLSFO/LSMGO + ABT 0,10 MTS/PD
LSMGO
IN PORT:
- WORKING: ABT 4,0 MTS/PD VLSFO/LSMGO + ABT 0,10 MTS/PD LSMGO - IDLE: ABT
2,5 MTS/PD VLSFO/LSMGO + ABT 0,10 MTS/PD LSMGO - BOILER (ONLY AT PORT): ABT
0.5 MTS/PD VLSFO/LSMGO - FOR EVERY BALLAST / DE-BALLAST / EXCHANGE OF
BALLAST OPERATION (EXCLUDING BWTS) ADDITIONAL ABT 1.0 MTS/PD VLSFO/LSMGO
- SPEED/CONS ARE APPROXIMATE PER 24 CONSECUTIVE HOURS AND BASED ON CLEAN
BOTTOM, EVEN KEEL, AND EFFECTIVE FOR VOYAGES EXCEEDING 48 HOURS TRANSIT
TIME, FROM SEA PILOT TO SEA PILOT, IN GOOD WEATHER CONDITIONS UP TO BEUFORT
SCALE FORCE 4 AND DOUGLAS SEASTATE 3, SIGNIFICANT WAVE HEIGHTUP TO 4FT,
EXCLUDING CURRENTS, SWELL, PASSAGE WITH RESTRICTED VISIBILITY AND IN
CONGESTED WATERS, STRAIGHTS, NARROWED WATERS WHERE VESSEL NORMALLY TRANSITS
WITH REDUCED SPEED AND WHILE FOLLOWING SLOW STEAM INSTRUCTIONS, MANEUVERING,
ENTERING OR LEAVING PORTS.
- FOR SPEED & CONSUMPTIONS, "ABOUT" MEANS +/-5% FOR CONSUMPTION CONCURRENTLY
WITH +/- 0.5 KNOT FOR SPEED EXCLUDING ADVERSE CURRENTS, ADVERSE SWELL.
COMMINGLE OF BUNKERS IS NOT ALLOWED.
- FUEL SPECIFICATIONS: LSMGO DMA/DMZ ISO: 8217:2017-2024 MAX 0,10% SULPHUR.
VLSFO RMG 380 ISO: 8217:2017-2024 MAX 0,5% SULPHUR.
 
BIMCO SLOW STEAM FOR TIME CHARTER PARTIES TO APPLY (DEC 2011).
BIMCO 2020 MARINE FUEL SULPHUR CONTENT CLAUSE FOR TIME CHARTER PARTIES TO
APPLY.
- ALONG WITH BUNKERS DELIVERY RECEIPT CHARTS TO PROVIDE WELL IN ADVANCE THE
COQ (CERTIFICATE OF QUALITY) AND THE MSDS (MATERIAL DATA SHEET) AS PER SOLAS
REGULATION VI/5-1, FOR EACH TYPE OF BUNKERS DELIVERED TO THE SHIP.
IN CASE OF EMERGENCY OR IN RESTRICTED WATERS, CANALS, WHEN MANEUVERING,
BALLASTING, DEBALLASTING, ENTERING OR LEAVING PORTS ETC VSL CONSUMES EXTRA
VSLFO OR LSMGO.
VESSEL CRANES TO BE OPERATED BY QUALIFIED SHORE PERSONNEL EMPLOYED AND PAID
BY CHARTS AT CHARTS ENTIRE RISK/RESPONSIBILITY AND EXPENSE.
STEELS, COILS TO BE LOADED IN ACCORDANCE WITH VESSEL'S LOADING MANUAL.
- IN CASE OF EMERGENCY OR IN RESTRICTED WATERS, CANALS, WHEN MANEUVERING,
BALLASTING, DEBALLASTING, ENTERING OR LEAVING PORTS ETC VSL CONSUMES EXTRA
VSLFO OR LSMGO.
- ALONG WITH BUNKERS DELIVERY RECEIPT CHARTS TO PROVIDE WELL IN ADVANCE MSDS
(MATERIAL DATA SHEET) AS PER SOLAS REGULATION VI/5-1, FOR EACH TYPE OF
BUNKERS DELIVERED TO THE SHIP
ALL FIGURES ARE ABOUT
ADA
